title: Raise module and refreshed Referral Programme arrive in 6 to 8 weeks
content_html:
The Raise module and an updated Referral Programme are coming to Cryptool inside the next 6 to 8 weeks, with the Portfolio module following close behind.

Raise gives investment groups, syndicates and projects a one-click way to launch and manage fundraising pools, with member allocation, refunds and distributions handled automatically.

The new Referral Programme brings a cleaner revenue share model and a faster path for ambassadors to start earning.

Portfolio, arriving shortly after, pulls investments, vesting schedules and historical performance into a single dashboard.

The exact launch dates depend on the final round of internal testing, which is in progress now.
author: Cryptool
